summary: W858 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W857's raw BoundedHomotopyLocalizedRightAdjointInput with the existing W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider via the W767 projection. It packages exact-closedness, W519 closedness, endpoint kernel/cokernel ExactAt facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data into the W857 route, then reuses W857/W831 for direct bounded left calculus and the stable package. Product success remains false because the route inputs, final original-four-task witness, and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W858 names the localized-right-adjoint requirement as W721 data, but still requires exact-closedness, a matched W519 closedness branch, endpoint kernel/cokernel facts, W721 localized-right-adjoint data, finite limits, finite colimits, pretriangulated, and triangulated data.

The W856 homology-free selected-cochain provider is still not concretely instantiated; its boundary, relation, target-surjective/compact, closedness branch, normalized target, source triangulation, endpoint facts, and localized-right-adjoint fields remain open.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or prove one concrete W858 input next, preferably endpoint ExactAt kernel/cokernel facts, exact-closedness, a matched W519 closedness branch, or the W721 localized-right-adjoint provider.
Connect the W858 route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
